content:
Constraints
* Please specify the lower and upper bounds for the length of each line in the original CGL code. (The lower bound should be 1 if cases with empty lines won't be added.)

* Please state that any character that is not an English letter will never be part of a variable name. (Example: digits. Underscores would also fall into this category, although they aren't used in the current cases.)

* The last constraint may need to be reworded to avoid confusion, since floating-point numbers appear in the cases.

Cases
* Consider adding cases where the code contains floating-point numbers with or without a sign (positive or negative) and trailing zeros either immediately after the decimal point or later in the fractional part, e.g. -620000.00, 3000.400, +95.1000, -8000.007000.

Thanks.
